backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Dard-e-munasif backend, implementing user profile management and CRUD operations for Poetry, Dua, and Song content types with access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two completed features: updating the app name to 'Dard-e-munasif' and replacing the logo/favicon with a custom circular image, both affecting frontend/index.html and Layout.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to one-sentence summaries describing the purpose of each component, page, hook, and config file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point setting the browser tab title to 'Dard-e-munasif' and the favicon to the custom circular logo image, with a root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with routes for Mix, Poetry, Dua, Songs, and Admin pages, wrapped in ThemeProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/admin/ContentMan: Admin panel component that lists all poetry, duas, and songs with delete actions, using confirmation dialogs and loading skeletons while data fetches.
frontend/src/components/admin/DuaUploadF: Form for uploading a new dua with title, content, and optional audio file, showing upload progress and resetting on success.
frontend/src/components/admin/PoetryUplo: Form for uploading a new poetry entry with title, content, and optional image file, tracking upload progress and resetting fields on success.
frontend/src/components/admin/SongUpload: A form component for uploading songs with title, artist, and audio file fields, showing upload progress and using the useCreateSong mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/AudioPlayer.tsx: Reusable audio player component with play/pause, seek slider, volume control, and time display, sourcing audio via ExternalBlob.getDirectURL().
frontend/src/components/DuaPost.tsx: Card component for displaying a Dua post with title, content, optional audio player, like count, and a download button that fetches audio bytes via ExternalBlob.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Defines the main app layout with a sticky header, desktop and mobile navigation links (Mix, Poetry, Dua, Songs), and a dark/light theme toggle button.
frontend/src/components/PINAuthGuard.tsx: Wraps children with a PIN-based authentication gate, persisting auth state in sessionStorage and showing a lock screen form if unauthenticated.
frontend/src/components/PoetryPost.tsx: Renders a poetry card with title, optional image, content preview, like count, and a download button that fetches and saves the image as a JPEG.
frontend/src/components/SongPost.tsx: Renders a song card displaying the title, artist, and an embedded AudioPlayer component; notes that downloading is not available.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) access with admin token initialization.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating poetry, duas, and songs via the backend actor, including get-all, create, and delete operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Urdu/Devanagari/Inter fonts, sets up Tailwind with light/dark CSS custom properties, and defines utility animations and typography styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin page protected by PINAuthGuard, providing tabbed UI for uploading (poetry, dua, song) and managing existing content.
frontend/src/pages/DuaPage.tsx: Page that fetches and displays all duas in a responsive grid, with loading skeletons, error alerts, and an empty state message.
frontend/src/pages/MixPage.tsx: Fetches all poetry, duas, and songs, merges them into a single list sorted by likes descending, and renders each item using its respective post component in a responsive grid with loading skeletons and error handling.
frontend/src/pages/PoetryPage.tsx: Fetches all poetry entries and displays them in a responsive grid using PoetryPost components, with loading skeleton, error alert, and empty-state handling.
frontend/src/pages/SongsPage.tsx: Fetches all songs and renders them in a responsive grid using SongPost components, with loading skeleton, error alert, and empty-state handling.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive parameters from the URL hash without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that sets up dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius variables, Urdu and sans-serif font families, accordion keyframe animations, and registers the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 13) for the 'Dard-e-munasif' multimedia content app, documenting existing features, architectural decisions, known issues, and image requirements for the custom logo.
